TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dennis Awtrey nalecuhan i Hollywood, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dennis Awtrey i 1970 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 46, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. 2 bulad 22 demiad, 1948 a mihca, Dennis Awtrey, miunduay.
S.PHON: d…ônnis awtr…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ƒßor~…ær~…æjwood, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. d…ônnis awtr…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia **…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, d…ônnis awtr…ô, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dennis Awtrey nalecuhan i Hollywood, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dennis Awtrey i 1970 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 46, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. 2 bulad 22 demiad, 1948 a mihca, Dennis Awtrey, miunduay.
S.PHON: d…ônnis awtr…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ƒßor~…ær~…æjwood, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. d…ônnis awtr…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia **…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, d…ônnis awtr…ô, miunduaj.
